arts.ttl: Ruben Selles talks Hull City's fight to survive and Sheffield Wednesday troubles
arts.sum: Ruben Selles admits the Hull City training ground was flat on Monday, after the players returned to work following Saturday’s 1-0 loss to Luton Town, but he says morale has lifted significantly in the days since as they prepare for Saturday’s trip to Sheffield Wednesday. Selles said he would watch the Rams' Pride Park encounter, but only because City host the Rams in their final MKM Stadium outing of the season at the end of the month, and not because he was worried about the potential impact on his team's place in the league table.

arts.ttl: Hull City can take inspiration from Derby County in survival mission
arts.sum: It's a result which is a disaster for Hull City because it leaves them a solitary place and point above the relegation zone; their defeat to Luton Town on Saturday has been doubly damaging. Having claimed just two points from Boxing Day to when they claimed their first win under John Eustace, they've now beaten Blackburn Rovers, Coventry City, Plymouth Argyle and now a Preston side who were quite frankly, awful, albeit on the wrong end of a couple of dodgy refereeing decisions from Stephen Martin.

arts.ttl: Preview: Sheffield Wednesday vs. Hull City - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Sheffield Wednesday and Hull City, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
